description:
Showcase your unique clothing line or new arrivals with this clean-cut Black Friday email template. Get right to the best part of Black Friday by placing a helpful discount promo in that first, bold Call To Action. 

All Beefree templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: A team of passionate designers, marketers, and technologists with an understanding that great design inspires action. At Beefree, we’re committed to creating responsive, mobile-friendly, and high-converting templates that empower teams to get more done with less time.
